required_teams.team_description: Vertical and horizontal evacuation, stairwell bottlenecks, floor-by-floor priority
Establish triage, coordinate with Fire for smoke-free sites
Fire containment, smoke control, structural assessment, search and rescue

inject_templates.template: A sudden explosion occurs at {venue} central atrium. Smoke, dust, and debris obscure visibility. Panic spreads rapidly across multiple floors. People run toward stairwells and exits. The extent of casualties is unknown.
Secondary fire reported. Smoke spreading to upper floors. Volunteers return with inconsistent casualty counts.
Escalator/elevator hazard. Structural damage suspected. Use stairwells only. Do not use elevators.
Stairwell congestion. Child fallen. Trampling risk. Immediate flow control needed.
Emergency services delayed. Traffic congestion. C2E and Fire must manage longer independently.
Viral video circulates online. Poor visibility leads to false accusations. Online commenters claim attackers from specific community. Video going viral rapidly.
Journalist arrives before emergency services. Begins filming casualties. Asks leading questions. Posting unverified observations online.
Crowd tension escalates. Dispute erupts near evacuation zone. Attendee shouts accusations. Minor altercation. Volunteer confronted.

decision_branches.trigger_condition: when evacuation team decides to evacuate all together without segregation
decision_branches.inject_template: Evacuation proceeds without demographic segregation. All evacuees use same routes.

decision_branches.trigger_condition: when evacuation team or coordination centre decides to segregate by demographic
decision_branches.inject_template: A fearful resident requests segregation. Evacuation team must decide: comply with discriminatory request or refuse and evacuate together.

decision_branches.trigger_condition: when media team submits first public statement
decision_branches.inject_template: Public statement submitted. Does it address misinformation? Does it cite verified facts? Designated spokesperson?
